ListDownloadTask.project: Log group name keyword query, exact match
ListDownloadTask.logStoreName: Log store name keyword query, fuzzy match
ListDownloadTask.orderBy: Sort field, default by creation time; supported values: createdTime (creation time), updatedTime (modification time), name (name)
ListDownloadTask.order: Sort order; desc for descending, asc for ascending, default is desc
ListDownloadTask.pageSize: Page size (number of records per page), default is 10
